author: y4rr
content: [result] All 66 f64 PTX kernels now use proper f64 precision. Replaced every f32 downcast pattern (cvt.rn.f32.f64 + ex2.approx.f32 + cvt.rn.f64.f32) with inline Cody-Waite range reduction + degree-11 Horner polynomial for exp, and argument reduction + Horner for log. Fixed the 1/3! coefficient bug (was using 1/4! = 0d3FA5... instead of 1/6 = 0d3FC5...). Fixed range reduction to use cvt.rni (round-to-nearest) instead of floor+0.5. Affected kernels: EXP, LOG, SIGMOID, TANH, all GELU variants, SILU, ELU, MISH, POW, SOFTMAX, LOG_SOFTMAX, LOGCUMSUMEXP + all their backward variants. 3271 tests pass.
